name: Horseradish-Mayonnaise Spread/Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the mayonnaise and prepared horseradish.
2. Stir in the Dijon mustard, garlic powder, and onion powder until well mixed.
3. Transfer the mixture to a covered container and store it in the refrigerator.
4. Use this spread as a sauce with roast beef or cold cuts.
5. Alternatively, use it on bread for meat or cheese sandwiches instead of butter or plain mayonnaise.
